## Architecture of `src/sys/`

### Platform Abstraction Pattern: **Compile-time `#[cfg]`-gated module substitution with glob re-export**

The pattern works in three layers:

#### Layer 1 — Top-level dispatch (`src/sys/mod.rs`)

The root `mod.rs` uses `#[cfg(...)]` attributes to conditionally compile exactly **one** platform backend module, then glob-re-exports its contents (`pub use self::unix::*`, etc.). This means the rest of the crate
